examples: Our views are diametrically opposed on this issue.
Two diametrically opposed water-filled "gondolas", each with a capacity of 360,000 litres, are fitted between the ends of the arms.
Now I would like to address the diametrically opposite concept: kindness in the office.
But, in all seriousness, this advice is diametrically opposite to the values espoused by Steve Jobs.
